CONTENT.Club career: Sobottka joined Fortuna Düsseldorf in 2015 from Schalke 04. He made his 2. Bundesliga debut on 22 August 2015 against SC Freiburg in a 2–1 home defeat replacing Julian Koch after 45 minutes.In June 2017, he agreed to new five-year contract until 2022.
CONTENT.External links: Marcel Sobottka at SoccerwayMarcel Sobottka at fussballdaten.de (in German)
CONTENT.International career: Sobottka played one cap for the Germany U20 national team in a friendly against the Poland U20.

SUMMARY: Marcel Sobottka (born 25 April 1994) is a German professional footballer who plays as a defender or defensive midfielder for Fortuna Düsseldorf in the 2. Bundesliga.
